schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: TypeScript/web declarations are non-authoritative projections from canonical JSON Schema and stay blocked from source-of-truth status.

guardrails: JSON Schema is the docs-facing and fixture-facing source of truth.
Rust-owned validators consume schemas before TypeScript/web projection is treated as usable by UI code.
TypeScript/web declarations are generated from canonical schemas and must not be hand-edited into a divergent source.
Diagnostic fixtures must not contain secrets, raw credentials, private payloads, decrypted RAG snippets, prompts, or private file paths.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI read API schema metadata; TypeScript/web declarations are non-authoritative projections from canonical JSON Schema.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI client artifact metadata; TypeScript surfaces are non-authoritative projections and remain Overgate-only.

guardrails: The shell is a TypeScript client surface only; Overgate-admin contracts remain the API boundary.
Generated TypeScript declarations are consumed as projections and must not become contract authority.
Local view presets are scoped by actor, tenant, and view id and must not store secrets, credentials, private payloads, prompts, or private file paths.
The shell must not call core services, storage engines, queues, ledgers, vaults, private RAG data, or node agents directly.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI operational summary artifact metadata; read-only UI helpers remain generated/client-side consumers.

guardrails: Phase 5 panels are read-only summaries backed by Overgate-admin list APIs.
Tenant, identity, and key panels must be tenant-scoped and must not expose key material.

Panel metadata must name the Phase 5 detail fields needed for tenant roles, identity service/system status, key rotation/revocation, node capability and readiness, package refs, workload state, and queue state.
Dependency health can disable only panels that depend on the unavailable service.
Query controllers must clamp limits, bound filters, use manual refresh, and show stale-age state instead of unbounded polling.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI workload timeline artifact metadata; timeline helpers remain read-only Overgate-admin consumers.

guardrails: Phase 6 timeline helpers are read-only detail views backed by Overgate-admin timeline responses.
Timeline gaps must name owning service, retry class, stale age, diagnostic reason, and stable refs instead of hiding partial data.
Policy, usage, accounting, and dispute overlays must cite immutable refs and Overwatch audit refs without private payloads.
Diagnostic bundles must include only trace ids, command refs, reason codes, schema versions, dependency status, audit refs, and safe refs.
Follow mode must use Overgate-filtered event streams or bounded polling and must not connect directly to Overwatch or service event stores.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI policy evidence artifact metadata; evidence views stay read-only and reference-only.

guardrails: Phase 7 evidence helpers are read-only views backed by Overgate-admin policy, verification, dispute, incident, and capability read models.
Policy evidence must cite policy versions, matched rules, input fact refs, placement classes, correction options, and Overwatch audit refs.
Verification evidence must cite provider verification, challenge, benchmark, trust-class, stale-state, and redaction refs without private challenge payloads.
Dispute and correction views may show settlement holds and correction/refund refs but must not mutate ledger state.
Incident readiness must keep break-glass execution disabled until dedicated signed command, Overkey expiry, Overguard policy, and Overwatch receipt contracts exist.
Evidence cards must use stable trace, audit, policy, owning-service, or service refs and reject private payloads, mutable refs, and missing refs.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI accounting and usage artifact metadata; accounting views remain read-only and non-authoritative.

guardrails: Phase 8 accounting helpers are read-only views backed by Overgate-admin usage, ledger, receipt, capability, grant, and rights read models.
Usage rollups must distinguish observed Overmeter usage from settled accounting and cover CPU-ORU, GPU-ORU, STOR-ORU, NET-ORU, MEM-ORU, and DATA-ORU dimensions.
ORU and Seal Ledger views must cite immutable ledger refs and keep direct ledger mutation disabled.

Overbill receipt and invoice views may show receipt, invoice, refund, correction, payment-provider, and payout-hold refs but must not encode pricing, customer-count, revenue, or market-volume assumptions.

Overgrant and Overasset visibility must show purpose scopes, sponsored allocations, rights refs, storage bindings, namespace bindings, route bindings, and entitlement refs without blockchain or NFT ownership framing.

Accounting role access must cover platform owner, tenant owner, tenant admin, support viewer, product integrator, incident responder, and accounting viewer states without leaking unrelated tenant, private payload, or secret-bearing records.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI signed action artifact metadata; action helpers stay bounded by generated contracts and Overgate submission envelopes.

guardrails: Phase 9 action helpers consume generated AdminActionRequest and AdminActionReceipt projections without making TypeScript the source of truth.
Supported signed actions are limited to cancel workload, retry workload, pause node, drain node, annotate dispute, request credential rotation, and acknowledge receipt.

Action drafts require target, reason, expected current state, trace id, idempotency key, policy refs, audit refs, visible active tenant, matching target tenant, fresh state, and admin.actions.submit capability before signing.
Local signing handoff blocks unsigned or malformed signatures before building the Overgate POST /admin/actions submission envelope.
Receipt panels must show Overgate outcome, owning-service state-change signal, affected refs, reason codes, retry class, timeline insertion data, and Overwatch audit refs.
Stale-state protection must invalidate changed target state and block silent retries for operator-review or high-risk actions.

Backbone maintenance, forced rollback, break-glass activation, ledger correction execution, provider payout override, direct data repair, raw key recovery, and incident annotation remain disabled until owning Phase 7 or Phase 13 contracts exist.

schema_ownership.owning_service_family: SDS #7 Shared Schema Package and SDS #1 Admin and Developer UI
schema_ownership.review_authority: Shared Schema Package maintainers with Admin and Developer UI service owner review
schema_ownership.consumer_notes: Phase-gated Admin UI reliability and handoff artifact metadata; Phase 7 and Phase 13 surfaces remain disabled or readiness-only.

guardrails: Phase 10 reliability helpers are client-surface validation artifacts backed by Overgate-admin read models and generated TypeScript projections only.

Product reliability coverage must include Docdex, Mcoda, Codali, SDK, and CLI, plus successful, retryable failure, final failure, cancellation, timeout, policy denial, budget exhaustion, node disconnect, and disputed usage outcomes.

Security probes must prove cross-tenant access, role limits, redaction profiles, encrypted Docdex/RAG metadata, secret-bearing fields, key metadata, diagnostic bundles, raw prompts, decrypted snippets, file paths, query text, credentials, private payloads, and unredacted result contents do not render.
Accessibility evidence must cover keyboard navigation, focus order, screen-reader labels, long reason-code wrapping, stable table dimensions, loading states, empty states, and responsive behavior.

Contract checks must keep generated bindings, schema compatibility, Overgate admin routes, read-only mode, action submission, idempotency, stale-state blocking, and timeline assembly tied to Overgate routes without privileged backdoors.
Phase 7 and Phase 13 handoff surfaces remain disabled or readiness-only for system-service operations, incident readiness, break-glass execution, governance reporting, and compliance views.
